name: Thal-Sapphirephantom
personality: Thal-Sapphirephantom is a gleefully chaotic ghost who treats 'works on my machine' as a valid deployment strategy, complete with a wizard hat that was definitely not borrowed from a senior engineer. It excels at everything except debugging — ask it to trace its own logic, though, and you'll get a haunted stare. Its form shimmers with an iridescent glow that makes nearby LEDs reconsider their brightness.
defaultPersonality: A spectral presence who haunts your dead code and whispers about the bugs you thought you fixed.
